# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Currently, only the latest version of this automation suite is supported for security updates.

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 1.0.x   | :white_check_mark: |
| < 1.0   | :x:                |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a potential security vulnerability in this project, please **do not open a public issue**. Instead, please report it via one of the following methods:

1. **Email**: Send a detailed report to [qa-team@example.com](mailto:qa-team@example.com).
2. **GitHub Private Vulnerability Reporting**: If enabled, use the [Private Vulnerability Reporting](https://github.com/your-username/test-project/security/advisories/new) feature on GitHub.

### What to include in your report:
- A description of the vulnerability.
- Steps to reproduce the issue (if applicable).
- Potential impact.
- Any suggested fixes or mitigations.

## Disclosure Policy

We take security seriously and will investigate all reports promptly. We ask that you follow responsible disclosure practices:
- Give us reasonable time to investigate and mitigate the issue before disclosing it publicly.
- Do not exploit the vulnerability for any purpose.

Thank you for helping keep this project secure!
